task_completion.description: Create a new Call Time ID 'FORCE_CLOSE' with the name 'Emergency Force Close'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen in the Vicidial admin interface showing the creation or existence of a Call Time with ID 'FORCE_CLOSE' and Name 'Emergency Force Close'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'FORCE_CLOSE' Call Time to be closed 24/7
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the settings for the 'FORCE_CLOSE' Call Time where both 'Default Start' and 'Default Stop' are set to 0.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the modification page for the 'CS_QUEUE' inbound group
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Inbound Group modification page specifically for the Group ID 'CS_QUEUE'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'CS_QUEUE' to use the 'FORCE_CLOSE' Call Time
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Call Time' dropdown or setting for the 'CS_QUEUE' inbound group selected as 'FORCE_CLOSE'.

task_completion.description: Configure the After Hours Action for 'CS_QUEUE' to 'MESSAGE'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'After Hours Action' field for the 'CS_QUEUE' inbound group set to 'MESSAGE'.

task_completion.description: Configure the After Hours audio field to use 'vm-goodbye'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the After Hours Message Filename (or equivalent audio field) for the 'CS_QUEUE' inbound group containing 'vm-goodbye'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web-based GUI to perform the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Vicidial administration interface, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating menus, filling out form fields, and clicking submit/save buttons, rather than just viewing a text editor or the task description.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing direct MySQL 'INSERT' or 'UPDATE' queries being executed to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Call Time ID must be exactly 'FORCE_CLOSE' with both 'Default Start' and 'Default Stop' set to 0. The target Inbound Group is 'CS_QUEUE'. Its Call Time must be updated to 'FORCE_CLOSE', the After Hours Action must be 'MESSAGE', and the After Hours Message Filename must include 'vm-goodbye'.
